description: Triggers for executing a pre-written implementation plan step by step with checkpoints

queries.query: Execute this implementation plan I've written — it's in Plan.md
I have a step-by-step plan to follow — execute it with checkpoints after each step
Run through this written migration plan one step at a time
Execute the plan in /docs/implementation-plan.md and pause for my review after each task
I've already designed the plan — now I need you to execute it systematically
Follow this 7-step deployment plan and verify each step before proceeding
Carry out the tasks in my plan document, checking in between steps
Execute this pre-approved plan with review checkpoints
Work through the implementation tasks I've documented in this file
I have a written spec — execute it step by step, stopping if anything fails
Write me an implementation plan for adding authentication to my app
Fix the bug in my login component
Brainstorm approaches before I implement this feature
Design the architecture for our microservices migration
Help me plan a database migration from PostgreSQL to MySQL
Write code to implement user authentication with JWT
Review my pull request and suggest improvements
Create a project roadmap for Q2
Debug why my tests are failing
Refactor this code to use TypeScript
